description.value:
Frequency once per day

Education is a powerful weapon—and so are guns; fortunately, you wield both to devastating effect. Attempt a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Recall Knowledge] check against a target you're aware of within 30 feet. You can use this result in place of your next attack roll. If you critically fail the Recall Knowledge check, you are overcome with analysis paralysis and become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Stunned]{Stunned 2}.
